data.name: severity.info
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] severity.info in blocks-accounting context — status badge for informational accounting messages (e.g., journal-entry posted, account reconciled). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.warning
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] severity.warning in blocks-accounting context — status badge for non-blocking accounting concerns (e.g., approaching period close, unposted batch). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.error
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] severity.error in blocks-accounting context — status badge for blocking accounting failures (e.g., unbalanced journal, missing GL account). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.critical
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] severity.critical in blocks-accounting context — status badge for ledger-integrity-impacting failures (e.g., trial-balance mismatch, audit-trail gap). Pairs with high-attention visual styling.

data.name: action.save
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] action.save in blocks-accounting context — pilot string for the cluster-A cascade proof. UI button or status label when persisting an accounting record (journal entry, GL account, depreciation schedule). Imperative; sentence case. Trailing U+2026 ellipsis indicates in-progress.

data.name: action.cancel
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] action.cancel in blocks-accounting context — dismiss/abort button on accounting forms and dialogs. Imperative; sentence case.

data.name: action.retry
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] action.retry in blocks-accounting context — retry button after a posting or export failure (e.g., QuickBooks IIF export). Imperative; sentence case.

data.name: state.loading
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] state.loading in blocks-accounting context — empty-state placeholder while fetching ledger data. Trailing U+2026 ellipsis (single character); translators preserve the convention.
